title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Isolated to scattered thunderstorms are expected for S Poland, NE Czechia, N Slovakia.

SLGT
Isolated to scattered thunderstorms are expected in the region. The main threats include small hail and strong wind gusts (+ non-convective) due to LLS, DLS, SRH and moisture a very weak and brief tornado during a stronger isolated cell could be possible
